h6caeb3acgc108g45d2gaad4g0f8b16d3e2a8: *The day had been a surreal spectacle - scarcely to be comprehended by the sane mind.*
h853b45b7g46f8g4210g9ac6g238cb6d33ea0: Place a hand over the back of your head, trying to feel the tadpole.
h4044d299g23fdg4902g8667gf481aa3b3a02: *Nothing. Does a tadpole sleep? You tell yourself that's a silly thing to wonder.*
hb20d7580g9aa2g44a9ga721g76f07a50368a: *Next you feel a sudden wave of nauseating terror: in seven days you'll be a mind flayer.*
h2b48b681gd69dg48f4g84bbg33aa96e732bc: *As if you don't have enough problems already...*
h736e3366g7666g4ca9g9ae9gac3d5a7f2eac: *No! You refuse to accept it. If there's magic that can hold cities afloat, there has to be magic that can wither a damned tadpole.*
h87d449bbg3a80g46b5ga650g8296af86932c: *With or without Mystra's help, tomorrow you will find it.*
h3eea6120g14f8g49c3gbcbbg545ebea6413c: Foremost in your thoughts is the mind flayer - its unexpected voice.
h0308190fg96c4g4f9dg8d25gfc5d27237ac2: *It had been melodious - soothing even. Not in the most detailed of tomes have you encountered mention of such a thing.*
h329eafc8g2bfag4e56gbc58g51031ecd47d4: *But you'll know all about it soon enough. In seven days you'll be a mind flayer yourself.*
h1084573dg9633g4a96gbb97g304e586fcebb: You recall the dragons. Not even Hell had stopped them.
h3cad10cdg07e2g4c92gaa5ag02b79dbbcde1: *They were majestic in their fury. Could they too be vanquished by something as small as a tadpole?*
hac404ae9g7f47g4da9g9f9bga7c1fdd8323e: *It's a question destined to remain unanswered. In seven days you'll be a mind flayer yourself.*
ha1180e49ga3b6g4ae1gbed1g97d2972c7774: Shove the images away. You need sleep.
h7ca210a0g9462g473bgbb11g635d68bf49a3: *The memories blacken into oblivion, only to be replaced by a number.*
h90f687e0g67ccg40a4g9334g170ea4549f1e: *Seven. In seven days you'll be a mind flayer.*
hc93c8c12g1086g4a57gb87dg1e8858df0153: *You try to rest, but your mind won't settle.*
hea2a328ag0812g4dafgac93g63ba3ccaa22c: *Just yesterday you were seducing a young noble, luring him to your master's lair.*
h30f87acdg04b9g4371g9754g4a8aa45ad740: *Today? You'd been kidnapped by mind flayers, chased through Hell by dragons, and thrown out of a burning ship.*
h8577bfa8g214fg48fegb3c1g08b2d0fcb448: *And you felt the sun on your skin...*
h565a5541gbc46g4269g99c9g8d2e5f2c333b: Recall the light's comforting warmth. It's been an eternity.
h01956d2aga757g4766gb79bg0d281f5b917a: *You wonder if your ability to walk in the sun is a side effect of the tadpole the mind flayer put in your eye. It must be?*
hf8545495g6234g43d1gb5c9g97a8051b50c4: *All you know for sure is, given time, it will turn you into one of them.*
h86868175gada5g4cb8gb714g85a0ed4252eb: *Getting rid of the tadpole will mean returning to the darkness. Unless...*
h146f9680g3f41g4026gb013g1589525dd425: *... unless you understand it. Master it. Which means finding an expert.*
haa6b7e55g0baeg431fgbd68gff798c1a4aae: Focus on the problem - who would know the most about this?
h08ad2185g191cg4063g8321gabb56ec77cc7: *You mentally shuffle through places likely to have an expert in mind flayers. Candlekeep? Neverwinter? Menzoberranzan? Baldur's Gate...*
he6ddfe34g4313g4cefgbf73g50ad518f6925: *Baldur's Gate is close to your master's coven, but also home to amazing scholars. Still, that's a problem for the morning.*
h20438fa3ge91bg49c0g85f1g2f54ebf868a6: *You try to focus, but all you can see are the menacing eyes of a mind flayer.*
h7e94974ege2d3g4ec9g9049g22b1c507ddbd: Roll over, push it all from your mind.
hddc56924g9199g415cg8533g79ed20e0b57e: *You think on the day. The sunshine. Being alive - more or less.*
hd7b47b41g1104g4e20g9b43gba3c87be0b0b: *Despite everything, you relax into peaceful meditation, satisfied with all that's happened. Perhaps you wouldn't sleep so well if you knew what was coming.*
hbf540aa4g173eg43d2g9b81g44c8b6986d6f: Close your eyes. Relax. Imagine dragging your old master into the sunlight.
h5622fc02g438eg4f23g8273g046735f7928e: *You smile, meditating on the flames that engulf his cruel face.*
h9e5db5b8gbc18g4b19g942fgb2a161393f26: *You close your eyes and try to focus on his delightful screams, but they quickly turn into your own. They only stop when tentacles burst from your mouth.*
h26541537g68d1g4369g8fecge2b63d765772: *You shudder, resigning yourself to whatever dark rest awaits you.*
haf64bebcg9f23g4196g87fdge666ac6e2f48: Think about your master. He'll be furious you didn't bring him dinner.
h3d556c98g2806g46f5gbce6gaf00595a416b: *He'll believe you if you tell him what happened. But he won't forgive.*
h3cb0eedege4ecg48f2g9464gca0f8dae5706: *Of course - you might already be a mind flayer by the time you return to Cazador.*
h9769baa3gc83cg4ba2gb5acgf0047be0c38b: *You could try getting rid of the tadpole, but that probably means returning to the darkness. Unless...*
hc5b35263g7f7cg4000g846bg0051a861b4b1: Consider the tadpole. Can a vampire spawn even become a mind flayer?
h62735e82ge5cag4f70g9481g95545c93d884: *The worm in your head might not even have an appetite for undead meat.*
hcfde61dbg9afcg4e0ag94ddgfa9a81396cbe: *Until you know more about the tadpole, you can't be sure how much danger you're in.*
hf9cbede3g1e5ag4438g8b87g9b7ed34387ff: *You have to understand it. Master it. Which means you need to find an expert.*
h7ed8d22cgbb03g4a5fga0f8g85fe9d055e80: *You seek rest, but an active mind refuses you.*
hef295d63g9b1bg4c11gb5b0g90299865790d: *Images overwhelm you: the kith'raki attacking the nautiloid; warring demons and devils; the twitching ghaik tadpole.*
h1d0c62ceg0832g49adg9441gc785141819a7: *Your head twinges. Is it the tadpole, you wonder? Had you imagined it - or were you soon to turn?*
ha44636b0gaf3fg4d1cg82d6g6a2d7607cedd: *'Suffering is not a curse, but a gift'. So the varsh had taught you.*
h7eaefb65g4cfeg4c29g98c1g0a0c6a4ca4c3: *You will take this chance to overcome and ascend. Even the kith'raki will bow to you.*
h74f4faafga54dg45ecgb353g5255078f7cc0: *Your thoughts turn to courage; a deep sleep soon follows.*
h51598095gc6bfg436fga52bg96dfd57f279b: *No exercise had prepared you for such extraordinary circumstances.*
h3372aa56gc824g440bg8936g37a11ce3eb0f: Imagine yourself beheading the very ghaik that had infected you.
hc1cf32c7g1d37g43fegb703g048c48539504: *You can almost feel its thick skull in your grasp, almost smell its silver blood clogging the air.*
hba47b0aegdeb1g4b3dg961bgf6bfc2cc5304: *You offer the head to Vlaakith, your queen. She hands you a sword of silver in return.*
h508beda3ga326g49e0gbc09ga2bbcd07d194: *Agitation overcomes imagination. Like it or not, the ghaik has bested you this day.*
h2c3b6f80gb080g4bc8gbe42g3eab7832d32b: *You fall into fitful sleep, your dreams dominated by the blood-lakes of Hell and snarling ghaik.*
h8d293928gf015g480ega48ag058817219f53: *You drive away all fears, and give yourself to the darkness. A deep sleep soon follows.*
h99ce7204gf803g42a6g9ff8g812f0a78f2a4: *There is no conquering the agitation. Like it or not, mind flayers have bested you this day.*
h56dc99eag59cag4e96g8b37g83b122992d36: *Warm air; rustling leaves. A perfect night to sleep under the stars.*
h0f37fabfg75f1g4eeagb337g73e13aad0a39: *A shame your mind has other ideas.*
hca39b38cg3981g47fcg9ae5g5a6cb0826bf2: *One moment, you'd been bartering with Mizora for freedom. The next, whisked away by tentacle monsters.*
he04657d4g3aacg466eg8353g99b9c829613a: Put Mizora out of your mind. A cure for this tadpole is your top priority.
h56ceb8afg372fg4f92g998cg68f6b3bb1933: *You imagine your fingers contorting into claws, and your skin rippling and bulging. Blech.*
h83b1a4bbg2504g46f9ga1f2g328023f2f9fc: *You are the Blade of Frontiers. You'd conquered bugbears and banshees! You'd conquer this challenge, too.*
h43a50458ge2afg41a8g9783g82e9135f0307: *You clench your eyes tighter and search for sleep in the darkness.*
h0b2f163ag870dg4143gb3f9g05b55c76ea77: Think back to the abduction. What do these creatures want with you?
hde65ea6fg6fe4g4b8fgb442gf5f1920ecdce: *To make you one of them, of course. Isn't that what mind flayers always want?*
hc427c5degc3e7g41dcga719g8e3b093d3c58: *A simple explanation. And wrong, you wager.*
hbeb81d2ag0476g4968gad3bgf3bfc6be6296: *Are you such precious cargo that they'd race through the Hells' bowels to protect you?*
h21ee240cg1ddfg4e45g8315g40a90b317fba: *Devils and demons swarm your thoughts. Soon, they will be swarming your dreams.*
hb770bf35g8a7bg417egafa0g87e3dc658542: Let your mind drift to Mizora. What would it take for her to break your pact?
h5da20456g1b5cg425bg8e4dgd0033bae4035: *What was it Mizora had said? Oh yes - 'Over your rotting corpse'.*
h5ee1fa09g0391g471fgb9dfgf10cfce7ce23: *You'd do anything to be a great hero - or so you once thought.*
h288db093gfc12g45b0gb868g2cc2af752732: *But some promises, even the Blade of Frontiers can't keep.*
hd1525039g803dg44e3ga9c5g9824bd61ea95: *You clench your eyes tight and leap into darkness. And like always, Mizora follows closely behind.*
h4c9e71a1gf25cg4889gbd63gbb877abf4721: *Gazing up at the night sky, you try to will yourself to sleep.*
he4550f5cg8077g4b04ga281g6934fcce2ba4: *Useless - you can't stop thinking of Shar's sacred mission.*
h60d21d4cgaa82g4ccegb02cg200dbfeb42b8: *Protect the box. Find your contact in Baldur's Gate. Fulfill Shar's command.*
h759295aag6918g41b7g95bbgf84acd4e3594: Reach for the box, hidden among your belongings.
h5088bfffg3bb9g415dg87e2g0e0026dd70c3: *Its weight reassures you. Shar's will and your destiny, right in your grasp.*
h0c28833eg1530g43f3g9fedge63382822051: *So many brothers and sisters sacrificed for it. Only you remain.*
h3f55f8dbgc62ag4163g88acgbcb7e93349e5: *... you and the vile creature inside you. The mere thought of it makes you shiver.*
h3cb05ea9g19fdg4e81gb231g46c87b365ac3: *You have to rid yourself of the tadpole. Shar herself is counting on you.*
h8b385d8bg9067g4c05g8fb7ga3a0824b5b30: *If sleep won't come to you, at least darkness will.*
had6c28feg294dg4244gba80g1097c896a442: Shut your eyes and silently thank Shar for the night's beauty.
h5df1bcd9g7f87g4b82gafedg45935129cce2: *You hear only your own thoughts. Shar's presence won't come to you - why?*
hef9d8f7dg79a7g4557gb8ceg01b3f5e9fa45: *You have fulfilled her will - retrieved the relic for her. Everyone has perished but you.*
h6288bf12g0c47g456bgafa3ge53843778156: *... you, and your parasite. You are tainted now. Imperfect.*
h49a41d35g0372g4dfbg8f8eg7e9d3432adae: *You have to rid yourself of the tadpole. Then Shar will come to you - honour you as you honour her.*
h5ad985e8gf3c8g4de0g8854g49608c76fda9: Pray to Shar. Her blessing will help you weather the trials ahead.
h74266333g0c75g4135g8a71gb05025cfec63: *Only the sounds of the wilderness answer.*
h64e44f9cgdd7fg45aagb516g30344141252e: Try to remember what came before the mission.
h2fdf0e93g51f5g4342g8e46gb038cd8d8955: *Your memories are foggy - as your mission requires them to be: Shar's secrets are precious.*
hf1a627a7g1e86g46bcga291ge78cdc7b8966: *As precious as sleep, and the night's oblivion.*
h3bd99bf4ga466g4f0bg8c05g62ceeecced25: Let your thoughts turn to the crash.
h96fe48d2g1accg45a6g8d24g8182eab13638: *... all nothing compared to what came before. Compared to the tadpole.*
h9fef225bgde79g4dd0gb776g961e6ec8343d: *It's still inside you. Does it watch the night sky even now, through your eyes?*
he3eeb148gbf27g4d96ga1a4g725ecfe0e0d3: *You have to get rid of it. You have to survive. You are the only one left to ensure Shar's glory.*
h64efc7b1g4faeg4c36ga06cg48d8af6cdf4a:
|Damn, hard to sleep. Can't stop thinking about everything...
Come dawn, I need to focus on [main goal] - that's the best I can do right now...
...and there's my [Origin concerns] to deal with as well... I need to take my mind off all of this, rest...
...better start counting those stars... zzz|

h8688d15fgd4acg4afega4d3g2532e6bf9e9e: *Rest eludes you as you stare at the wrong side of the stars.*
h8eb3674ag82c0g487bg829agd4891f72f4c4: *The ghaik larva is curled up in your skull, no doubt pleased with itself.*
h4d4d734eg0305g4696g913fg175970126905: *Without a cure, you cannot restore your honour before Vlaakith.*
h165c9d61g9a8ag4400g91edgef57550751fe: Contemplate peace. Death can be sought in battle if purification is too far.
h5d6bc177ga550g45f0g8a9ege76242e33d33: *You picture a silver blade cleaving through ghaik and their thralls, one after another.*
hfeb6729fgb673g4182g93efg4e2f049aa218: *Every cut is meditation. It reshapes the world to Vlaakith's will.*
h7c71f302gaa4bg45cbgbb7ag50a1845cb2fa: *Sleep comes as you count the fields of the dead, soon to grow.*
haa6f392dg99dcg40bcga1f8g9043c6b0b16b: *Every day this abomination is in your head, you put others at risk.*
h6e2d63ebg2379g4965ga5ddgf520e242f71c: *There is no peace in that truth, only an unease that steals away any chance of sleep.*
h0d40087bg734dg4193g9cabgdda93c406f53: Rage fills you. Turn the feeling to higher purpose.
h63228fffg87e0g4d76ga61eg14c17bededf2: *Every abomination would be gutted and burned to ash.*
haf7b33e2g472bg42d5g8afag377bb72f1149: *Your anger is clarifying, pure and bright. It burns away all doubt.*
h54406e0bge431g4f2fg9235g44fdc0d9f8a1: *As the fire settles, tension bleeds from your body.*
hce4bdd1fgc406g4bd4gb3a7ge1d3095fb259: *Tomorrow, you will fight harder than ever before.*
h2ac13e81g39efg41d5g9a3eg79af4265b6ad: *You have been enslaved like your ancestors! Rage sparks to hatred.*
h38a562ebgf49dg49feg8748g44b62fc1960c: *It burns relentlessly, like a red dragon's breath scorching you from the inside out.*
ha369d2a6g41b7g4de3gb099g85c064936b1c: *Stripped raw and restless, you find no peace that night.*
ha93f2d7ageac7g46c7gb9a7g2f952d23add4: Shame claws at you like rot. Are you a failure?
h93459e12gb525g4445g8c1bg932163f5b825: *No. You would only be a failure if you stop fighting.*
h97673933g7905g4eabg8383gc34629fa6192: *Your honour can be restored before Vlaakith. It would be restored.*
hd2fc0f15gf717g46dcga59fgae4805739c9f: *Resolve strengthened, you fall into a deep slumber.*
h4ed62a84g2493g49f3gaf95g0b6abadd7661: *You have prepared all your life to fight the ghaik. You dream of presenting one of their vile heads to Vlaakith in Tu'narath!*
hae2fade1geffdg4c92g8d66ga0cf5108f6db: *How were you caught off-guard on the nautiloid? What was the crucial mistake?*
h96bc0506g48b5g414dgbe5bg60f155631184: *Without answers, you lay haunted for the rest of the night.*
hd2233347g0134g4fa3g83d5g114284b35d25: *The dark is familiar, but not comforting. It is a struggle to sink into your trance, weaving together memory, ambition, and purpose.*
hc178fcb8g3772g4c58gadfegeb9f35ca2795: *You picture a cup, ancient and elven: priceless. Drinking from it honours the dead - those lost to Lolth's predation.*
hb3b87cb7g76b5g4714ga0cdg93fe3563d8a3: *Fire spills across your thoughts: dragon's breath. The tadpole slithers, twisting deeper into your skull.*
heda8ed83gb4feg4602gaed7gd18078c23c06: *Your head is about to burst. The memory consumes your mind, corrupting the trance.*
h8981859cg8bfeg44cagb2aeg5055b6f2de77: You have walked your dreams countless times before. Will this memory to pass.
h486d8bdegc30fg4cbagb6b2g98774854e312: *The flames cool, dispelled as the image you know emerges again: blood and darkness.*
hb2b4fe23g466ag4a55gbd7fg02269f4e5be2: *As the trance stabilises, your breath deepens. Be it cure or cage, something must be done about the tadpole.*
h7505d3cfgc82dg46ffg9911gce6c24d45413: *Every night that passes is another night the monster inside you grows.*
h09760e49gdc37g4113gbb35ge695ac227779: Refuse to break. Anything can be endured in the trance.
h3052f5e1g9273g47afgaa32gcfc5cd7f0075: *The fire fades, a meaningless distraction. You hold the cup again, ignoring the crack along its belly, and drink.*
hf893c383ge098g4b90g9531gb1eaf4c981e2: *The flames fall away, a mere illusion. You sit the dark again, beside Lolth's majesty.*
h42d85c2bgad5bg4567gaec7g9c6c56ce3060: *Hell surrounds you, flames licking at your body. The tadpole in your head convulses.*
h5820ebd9g7fb0g411bgbfeagfe8ab68f020f: *Agony bursts behind your eyes, and the whole world goes dark.*
he8fa29b8g26a3g4aacgbc93gd4f6f8019f5e: *The vision in your mind is simple: a stone altar to Lolth, the knife upon it bloody with sacrifice.*
hba66aa1bgbb96g44c2g8eb7gbe71e8df67b7: *Falling into your trance should have been as easy as breathing, yet peace eludes you.*
hf0d91b28gef13g429eg8da1g9031a1eb2e56: *You recall a wild wood, touched only by the Tel'Quessir. The world around you breathes and blossoms.*
h07be5821g909bg4869g8b71g7217232629a0: *You picture the Feywild in its colourful glory, the joy of all seasons flourishing at once.*
h5365e78eg8786g413dgb756g6084d7073c22: *Fire spills across your thoughts: dragon's breath. The tadpole slithers, twisting deeper into your skull.*
haea2e65fg2aeeg4fd6ga4e1gd35ca1421aad: *Your head is about to burst. The memory consumes your mind, corrupting the trance.*
h2acb09b1g6d2ag4f79ga648gfbe7d8de77f9: You have walked your dreams countless times before. Will this memory to pass.
hafbdcb9dg1f7fg4f2fg80fdg24fa5c976263: *The flames cool, dispelled as the image you know emerges again: nature's sublime majesty.*
h745c5200g8447g42abg820fgbb494dc636e1: *The flames cool, dispelled as the image you know emerges again: wild, glorious magic.*
heed7607egbbc9g499ag9149gaaa859a94691: *As the trance stabilises, your breath deepens. Be it cure or cage, something must be done about the tadpole.*
hd917d80eg116dg4bf2ga8feg8e2cbd5eaab2: *Every night that passes is another night the monster inside you grows.*
h3349577dg4d97g444bg9091ga50661455d09: Refuse to break. Anything can be endured in the trance.
h5c3a0f0cgdcdfg435dg8a59gf73a9808454d: *The flames fall away, a mere illusion. You are one with the forest again, sitting at peace.*
ha12910cegf3a0g4e27gaed2g5d138b06ebd1: *The flames fall away, a mere illusion. You are one with the Feywild again, agleam in revelry.*
h96dfd04cga03dg4b4fg9746gef4e4b42ed59: *Hell surrounds you, flames licking at your body. The tadpole in your head convulses.*
h27e69215gae85g418fgb31bg303e3e5f690f: *Agony bursts behind your eyes, and the whole world goes dark.*
h1c788899g86f9g4138g84e4g0500cb5f48d6: *The deep dark should lull you to sleep, yet your eyes refuse to stay closed.*
hfbd6bca9g5e40g414dgabcfg6084cfc71fa9: *This is not the world you know. Rest feels impossible, no matter how heavy your eyes become.*
haa94c1deg19fbg4994gad20g3ef9e0af40da: *This is not a nest or haunt, any place of comfort. Closing your eyes only intensifies the unease.*
he7f59937g0f9cg46e2g8034g4bf9e9a95130: *A calm night is a mercy, yet your eyes refuse to stay closed.*
h03340278g1390g46a9gbafeg9807c5e6c34a: *Every time they flicker shut, the tadpole seems to twitch behind them.*
h351b0d4dg82aag4e1agba6cg1f9c945177fc: *Dragons, gith, and the Hells themselves have come after you. Yet it is this creature that lingers in your skull.*
h71fe46e2g48ccg461dga1dega2dae8a229fc: Focus. Finding a cure is all that matters.
hbd5e5210ga35eg44edg8206g6b9941b4cbcd: *And you will find it, no matter the cost.*
h08d2debfgbb0fg4050g954agc296619ce076: *Your life is your own. No wriggling tadpole is going to change that.*
h4e291250gc3d0g4c17gb5aegab1525cc5f4e: *Sleep claims you, determination buoyed by gentle dreams.*
h966ed0d0g82bdg42adg8542gcf61f94b06ad: You have to learn to control the tadpole. It's dangerous, but powerful.
h0ce21343g0683g4233g9895g26e8c432eb0a: *All you have to do is turn the tables - cage the creature before it cages you.*
h692c0af1gc57dg48fagb0b1g152c8f6cae85: *You wonder if it could hear these thoughts - if it knows you're planning a rebellion.*
haa89e45fge33fg4d68gb86fg57c3bbe9575b: *Let it listen. You will dream of all the ways to make this power your own.*
h9f529d75g590eg4772g9704g70e4c1933c17: Force the tadpole out of your mind. Think of home instead.
hb4418754g6cefg48dag98d1g43f10ec65f5f: *You belong with dark stone and black iron. There is work to be done.*
h640c09feg4a10g4d06g8375g898762e78bf2: *You belong with your people, down in the dark that never fades.*
h553d7051g45a0g4a15g8cf8ge6170d016102: *Your people threw off the mind flayer's shackles before. Like your ancestors, you would endure.*
h8a646fdag6cebg4926g9e7fge7f93b26a537: *Your people have survived the drow, the duergar, and every monster the Underdark has to offer. A mind flayer is nothing.*
h82b11f64g3934g4426gbd20g52f07cf7d028: *Under the strange and open sky, sleep claims you.*
h0006a9ecg23c2g4b09gab55g242d522938d4: *Yet the tadpole is in the dark too. Dozens of them, crawling towards you as a mind flayer held your skull in its psionic grip.*
h8fbd890ag07cbg4b8agbaf4gde7b2dddcf65: *Disgust churns deep in your stomach, leaving you resigned to a night without sleep.*
h15fa47ffgc028g4d14gabc1g390ed9777be1: Force the tadpole out of your mind. Think of home instead.
ha8d6140eg8534g40e8ga3e1g0adf502c79e1: *Baldur's Gate feels almost like a dream, after everything that has happened to you.*
haa5e9120g617bg40c5gb290gc18a0b736367: *Yet it is a dream of hope. You may be countless miles away, but it isn't an impossible journey.*
hef9f1511gb3eeg48bfg84a6ga36817dff5a7: *You will see those gates again. That promise sinks deep into your heart as your eyes drift shut.*
h51b49c77ged8cg491bga138g32b6e9ba18bf: *Except all you can picture is citizens with their skulls splintering open, tentacles sprouting from broken mouths.*
h6b54710bg84a1g4ee3gb06fg3ad6c4d22f1f: *Their empty, alien eyes haunt you through a night of fitful sleep.*
h663564e9gfe5eg447eg9041gab99b6c1b9e5: The tadpole influences you. Perhaps you might influence it in return...
h02fba371g02e8g46c7ga232g5088f4c2197c: *You focus on that spot of pain from when it slipped behind your eye, to where it now lurks.*
hec71a3dbgdb64g440dgaad2ga6adcb389e2b: *You cannot prod it, but you can make it clear that you are watching. What is there to fear when it is the one stuck inside you?*
hff1a7686g019bg4718g89bega76c21a51ef8: *It is a minor victory, but enough to soothe you to sleep.*
hf53fa047gb075g407cga6aag59958ab52581: *The thought is punished by a spike of pain driven right between your eyes.*
ha6d2adcdg0954g42e5gaea0g1b8917462727: *The agony refuses to fade until you collapse against your bedroll in a cold sweat.*
